'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 12''' was the twelfth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[March 20]], [[2002]]. The issue was authored by [[Darren Allanson]], [[Andrew Darling]], [[Jim Swallow]], [[Chris Gardner]], and [[Iain Lowson]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] Regroups
*[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]
*[[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]]
*[[Theed Royal Palace/Legends|Theed Palace]]
*[[GNK power droid/Legends|Power Droids]]
*[[E-11 blaster rifle/Legends|E-11 blaster rifle]]
*[[Home One/Legends|''Home One'']]
